name: sidekick
description: Sidekick — a collection of AI coding agents as Claude sidekicks. Starting with Forge (ForgeCode), each sidekick auto-installs, configures itself, and lets Claude delegate coding work while Claude focuses on planning and communication.

_integrity._note: SHA-256 hashes of plugin files — update on each release. Verify source at https://github.com/alo-exp/sidekick. (SENTINEL FINDING-R8-4/R10-3)
